name: 炼金：斯翠海文
description: 炼金：斯翠海文共30张卡牌，将于2026年5月20日上线万智牌：竞技场。感谢六宜散人翻译，以及轻脚翻译并制作中文卡图。

cards.name: Summitfest Closing Ceremony
cards.text:
Starting `intensity` 3
`Covercast` — Whenever you cast another instant or sorcery spell, if five or more mana was spent to cast it, this card intensifies.
Add X {U} and X {R}, where X is this spell's intensity.
Draw a card.
FLAVOR
Paint the sky purple
—Prismari expression meaning "hold nothing back"
cards.zhs_text:
起始强度3
`协奏`～每当你施放另一个瞬间或法术咒语时，若施放该咒语时支付过五点或更多法术力，则`强化`此牌。
加X点{U}和X点{R}，X为此咒语的强度。
抓一张牌。
FLAVOR
紫染长空
～粹丽用语，意指「全力以赴」

cards.name: Variable Solutions
cards.text:
If X is 1, `seek` a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped.
If X is 2, each opponent sacrifices an artifact of their choice.
If X is 3, `conjure` a random creature card with mana value X onto the battlefield.
If X is 4 or more, you gain 2 life. Then do all of the above.
cards.zhs_text:
如果X为1，则`取出`一张地牌并将之横置放进战场。
如果X为2，则每位对手各牺牲一个依其选择的神器。
如果X为3，则将一张法术力值为X的随机生物牌`幻变`进战场。
如果X等于或大于4，则你获得2点生命。然后以上皆作。

cards.name: Blood Age Muster
cards.text:
Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, `conjure` a random card from Blood Age Muster's spellbook onto the battlefield. Its base power and toughness `perpetually` become 2/2. This ability triggers only once each turn.
FLAVOR
Shouts from the Lost Barracks ring out across the Fields of Strife, tempting students to explore the off-limits location.
cards.zhs_text:
每当一张或数张牌离开你坟墓场时，从血腥时代集军的法术书中将一张随机牌`幻变`进战场。其基础力量与防御力`永久`成为2/2。此异能每回合只会触发一次。
FLAVOR
失落兵营喊杀声响彻争斗战场, 诱引学生深入禁地探索究竟。

cards.name: Paradigm Shifter
cards.text:
（暂无英文原文，翻译自日文文本）
When this creature enters, conjure a card of your choice from Paradigm's spellbook into your hand.
{T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.
cards.zhs_text:
（暂无英文原文，翻译自日文文本）
当此生物进场时，从定式法术书中选择一张牌。将该牌`幻变`进你手上。
{T}：加两点法术力，其颜色组合由你选择。此法术力只能用来施放瞬间或法术咒语。

cards.name: Iterating Phoenix
cards.text:
（暂无英文原文，翻译自日文文本）
`Flying`
Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, Iterating Phoenix perpetually gets +1/+1. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, you may exile Iterating Phoenix. Then return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control. This ability also triggers if Iterating Phoenix is in your graveyard.
cards.zhs_text:
（暂无英文原文，翻译自日文文本）
`飞行`
`炫示`～每当你施放瞬间或法术咒语时，迭变凤凰`永久`得+1/+1。若施放该咒语时支付过五点或更多法术力，则你可以放逐迭变凤凰。然后将它在其拥有者的操控下横置移回战场。此异能于此牌在你坟墓场中时亦可以触发。

cards.name: Ursine Guide
cards.text:
This creature enters `prepared`.
Whenever you cast a spell that isn't from your starting deck, conjure a card named `Bear Cub:0` onto the battlefield. This creature becomes `prepared`.
cards.zhs_text:
此生物进场时`已备法`。
每当你施放来自你起始套牌之外的咒语时，将一张名称为`幼熊:0`的牌`幻变`进战场。此生物成为`已备法`。
cards.text2: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Bear you control. They gain trample until end of turn.
cards.zhs_text2: 在每个由你操控的熊上各放置一个+1/+1指示物。它们获得践踏异能直到回合结束。

cards.name: Advanced Floral Invocations
cards.text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, mill two cards.
CLASS {B/G}: Level 2
Whenever a land you control enters, creature cards in your graveyard `perpetually` get +1/+1.
CLASS {4}{B/G}{B/G}: Level 3
You may play lands and cast creature spells from your graveyard. If you cast a spell this way, that creature enters with a `finality counter` on it.
cards.zhs_text:
（获得下一等级便能新增相应异能；只能于法术时机如此作。）
地落～每当一个由你操控的地进场时，磨两张牌。
CLASS {B/G}：等级2
每当一个由你操控的地进场时，你坟墓场中的生物牌`永久`得+1/+1。
CLASS {4}{B/G}{B/G}：等级3
你可以从你坟墓场中使用地和施放生物咒语。如果你以此法施放咒语，则该生物进场时上面有一个`终命指示物`。

cards.name: Corpseweaver Prodigy
cards.text:
`Deathtouch`
If a creature an opponent controls would die, exile it instead.
Infusion — At the beginning of your second main phase, if you gained life this turn, conjure a card named `Bridge from Below:0` into your graveyard.
cards.zhs_text:
`死触`
如果某个由对手操控的生物将死去，则改为将它放逐。
输注～在你的第二个行动阶段开始时，若你本回合中获得过生命，则将一张名称为`阴界渡桥:0`的牌`幻变`进你的坟墓场。

cards.name: Scalar Scholar
cards.text:
`Increment`
When this creature enters, each card you own with {X} in its mana cost perpetually gains "This spell costs {1} less to cast."
cards.zhs_text:
`递增`
当此生物进场时，由你拥有且法术力费用中包含{X}的牌均`永久`获得「此咒语减少{1}来施放。」

cards.name: Distracted Botanist
cards.text:
`Deathtouch`, `Lifelink`
When this creature dies, permanent cards in your graveyard `perpetually` gain "When this permanent enters, you draw a card and gain 1 life."
cards.zhs_text:
`死触`，`系命`
当此生物死去时，你坟墓场中的永久物牌`永久`获得「当此永久物进场时，你抓一张牌且获得1点生命。」

cards.name: The Mystical Archive
cards.text:
As this land enters, draft a card from The Mystical Archive's spellbook and exile it face down.
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast spells that aren't from your starting deck.
{2}, {T}: Put a card exiled with this land into its owner's hand.
cards.zhs_text:
于此地进场时，从秘典宬的法术书中抽选一张牌并牌面朝下地放逐之。
{T}：加{C}。
{1}，{T}：加两点任意颜色的法术力，其颜色组合由你选择。此法术力只能用来施放来自你起始套牌之外的咒语。
{2}，{T}：将一张以此地放逐的牌置于其拥有者手上。
